en_title: Why Turn-Based RPGs Are Resurging, According to Final Fantasy Resonance Devs
cn_title: 《最终幻想：共鸣》制作人谈回合制RPG复兴
subtitle: 浪潮再起
opus_summary: 《最终幻想：共鸣》制作人Nakashima和Furuya接受IGN采访，探讨回合制RPG复兴。Nakashima认为像素回合制仍有进化空间。

paragraphs.en: Final Fantasy returning to turn-based combat through the upcoming Final Fantasy Resonance is a pretty big deal, even if you were just going off the reception to its initial reveal. Many folks, including myself, are thrilled to see the series' name attached to a game with an HD-2D art style and have the story of Brave Exvius get adapted in the form of Resonance. In my exclusive hands-on preview of Final Fantasy Resonance , I experienced first-hand just how its rethinking turn-based combat with a stagger system, the Job-like Visions, and intricate party customization. And I got to dig deeper into its inspirations, namely Final Fantasy V, in a conversation with producer Keisuke Nakashima and director Hiroto Furuya .
paragraphs.cn: 《最终幻想》系列通过即将推出的《最终幻想：共鸣》回归回合制战斗，本身就是一件相当轰动的大事，光从初次亮相的反响就能看出端倪。许多玩家（包括我在内）都兴奋地看到，这款采用HD-2D美术风格的游戏冠以《最终幻想》之名，并将《勇气启示录》的故事改编成了《共鸣》。在我对《最终幻想：共鸣》的独家上手试玩中，我亲身体验了它如何通过破防系统、类似职业的「幻象」以及复杂的队伍定制，重新诠释回合制战斗。此外，我还与制作人中岛圭介和导演Hiroto Furuya进行了交谈，更深入地了解到本作的灵感来源，特别是《最终幻想V》。

paragraphs.en: There's also this lingering feeling that turn-based RPGs have had a resurgance in recent years. By no means did they ever go away – look at the continued success of Atlus RPGs (Persona, Metaphor, Shin Megami Tensei) and Square Enix's own (Octopath Traveler and Dragon Quest remakes). And let's not forget Baldur's Gate 3 is part of this wave. Plenty of independent games kept the spirit alive as well with the likes of Sea of Stars, Chained Echoes, Dosa Divas, and the ongoing saga of Deltarune, just to name a few. However, there's no denying that the mainstream spotlight is brighter than it has been with last year's critically acclaimed, award-sweeping Clair Obscur: Expedition 33. So, with that momentum in the genre and bringing it back to Final Fantasy, I also asked Nakashima and Furuya about their perspective on the sort of renaissance we're seeing with turn-based RPGs.
paragraphs.cn: 有一种挥之不去的感觉是，回合制RPG在近年来迎来了复苏。它们当然从未真正消失——看看Atlus RPG（《女神异闻录》《暗喻幻想》《真·女神转生》）以及史克威尔艾尼克斯自家作品（《歧路旅人》和《勇者斗恶龙》重制版）的持续成功就知道了。也别忘了《博德之门3》也是这股浪潮的一部分。众多独立游戏同样让这种精神得以延续，例如《星之海》《锁链回声》《Dosa Divas》以及仍在连载的《三角符文》，凡此种种，不胜枚举。然而，不可否认的是，随着去年备受好评、横扫各大奖项的《光与影：33号远征队》的出现，回合制RPG的主流聚光灯比以往更加耀眼。于是，趁着这股类型大势，我将话题拉回《最终幻想》，询问Nakashima和Furuya如何看待我们正在经历的这场回合制RPG复兴。

paragraphs.en: "I still believe that there's room to grow, evolve, and advance, even for pixel art turn-based games at this moment in time," Nakashima told me. "Of course, the experience is very much ingrained in the classics, leaning into something that feels familiar. However, incorporating some of these new technologies, I still believe there's a future for these types of experiences that even if you play it current and in this modern day, these types of RPGs may not necessarily feel dated. There is still very much a future for these games, and perhaps that's where all of this is coming from."
paragraphs.cn: 「我仍然相信，即便是在当下，即使对于像素美术的回合制游戏，也依然有成长、进化和发展的空间。」Nakashima告诉我，「当然，这类体验深深植根于经典，倾向于让人感到熟悉。然而，通过融入一些新技术，我仍然相信这类体验是有前途的。即使你在今天这样一个现代环境下玩它，这类RPG也未必会让人觉得过时。这些游戏仍然大有未来，或许这就是这一切的源头。」

paragraphs.en: Furuya attributes part of it to the ubiquitousness of handheld gaming and how it lends itself well to this style of game, letting players play them more accessibly in their free time. However, Furuya touched on something deeper happening within the game development scene.
paragraphs.cn: Furuya将其部分归因于掌上游戏的普及，以及掌机本身就很适合这类游戏，让玩家能更便捷地在空闲时间游玩。不过，Furuya还触及了游戏开发领域内更深层的变化。

paragraphs.en: "I feel like a lot of us creators who had grown up playing turn-based games are now creating games ourselves. It feels like there's this general movement towards revisiting and potentially reassessing or reworking some of the experiences we personally had when we were younger," Furuya stated. He continued by mentioning Sandfall Interactive's hit RPG, saying, "When we're talking about Clair Obscur, I believe they are creators who grew up playing JRPGs."
paragraphs.cn: 「我觉得，我们许多创作者从小是玩着回合制游戏长大的，现在自己也在做游戏。感觉有一种普遍的趋势，就是重新审视，甚至可能重新评估或改造我们年轻时亲身经历的那些体验。」Furuya说道。他接着提到了Sandfall Interactive的热门RPG，说：「提到《光与影：33号远征队》，我相信他们也是一群玩着JRPG长大的创作者。」

paragraphs.en: To Furuya, it's not just something happening in games, however. "I think it's a movement that we're also seeing in anime, manga, and other mediums where creators are now revisiting past projects, remaking them, and reimagining them. That's also potentially a factor that contributes to this kind of resurgence that we're seeing right now."
paragraphs.cn: 然而，对Furuya来说，这不仅仅发生在游戏领域。「我认为这是一种运动，我们也在动漫、漫画等其他媒介中看到，创作者们正在重新审视过去的项目，重制它们，并重新想象它们。这也可能是促成我们现在看到的这种复兴的一个因素。」

paragraphs.en: In a similar vein, P-Studio director Kazuhisa Wada told Game Informer , "What we’re calling a ‘resurgence’ may simply be the rediscovery of things that had fallen outside our field of view," in a story covering the modern wave of turn-based games and mainstream success. It speaks to the fact that it is also on the minds of those who are making the very games that contribute the genre's success.
paragraphs.cn: 类似地，P-Studio总监和田和久在Game Informer关于现代回合制游戏浪潮及主流成功的报道中也表示：「我们所说的‘复兴’，也许只是重新发现了那些曾从我们视野中消失的事物。」这恰好也说明，那些正在制作让这一品类大获成功的游戏的人，同样在思考这一问题。

paragraphs.en: Final Fantasy Resonance is set to launch on October 22, this year for PlayStation, Xbox, PC, and Nintendo Switch 1 and 2. For more on Square Enix's upcoming RPG, be sure to check out my hands-on preview and read my full interview with Nakashima and Furuya on its development history.
paragraphs.cn: 《最终幻想：共鸣》将于今年10月22日发售，登陆PlayStation、Xbox、PC以及任天堂Switch 1和2。想了解更多关于史克威尔艾尼克斯这款即将推出的RPG，请务必查看我的实机预览，并阅读我对Nakashima和Furuya关于本作开发历史的完整采访。

paragraphs.en: Michael Higham is an editor at IGN who regularly contributes with reviews, previews, features, and news in written and video form. He's usually entrusted with covering long RPGs and tech products, but he's got range when it comes to games. You'll also catch him at events and hosting video content, including IGN's weekly podcast Unlocked .
paragraphs.cn: Michael Higham是IGN的编辑，经常以文字和视频形式撰写评论、预览、专题和新闻。他通常被委派评测长篇RPG和科技产品，但在游戏方面涉猎广泛。你也会在活动上见到他，并主持视频内容，包括IGN的每周播客《Unlocked》。
